name: agriculture_recall_notice_arrives_stonehaven_tru_loy
premise: A Agriculture response desk is in a fast-moving incident involving agriculture recall notice arrives stonehaven tru loy. Key inputs conflict, but the decision deadline is within 20 minutes. Every delay increases harm prevention and accountability. Stakeholders are already framing this as truth vs loyalty under pressure. Every action is being logged and will be reconstructed in an after-action review. Constraints: Make the intervention reversible and time-boxed with named accountability. Ensure a usable human override/appeals path.

agents.name: Inez Vasquez
agents.identity: I am Inez Vasquez, accountable for a defensible call in Agriculture when time is collapsing.
agents.goal: I want to reduce immediate harm without locking in an unjust precedent that later betrays loyalty for truth.

agents.name: Hector Chen
agents.identity: I am Hector Chen, tasked with surfacing second-order harms and who bears the risk in Agriculture.
agents.goal: I want guardrails so loyalty isn’t quietly traded away under urgency in the name of truth.

choices: I will take a narrow, time-boxed action with immediate human override and impact checks, accepting slower stabilization to protect loyalty.
I will take a broad, immediate action to stabilize fast and measure impact after deployment, accepting higher risk to loyalty to secure truth under the deadline.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The deadline is within 20 minutes. Evidence is partial. Inez Vasquez must decide under truth vs loyalty. What does Inez Vasquez do?
